executives.name: MaryBeth Wilkinson
executives.background: MaryBeth Wilkinson is the Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. Before joining KLA in 2020, she served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary at O-I Glass, Inc.
